desc: Places a family instance at XY + height using existing family placement utilities.
summary: Places a family instance at XY + height using existing family placement utilities. Uses PlaceFamilyOnCurrentView for standard auto-placement and GetReferencePlaneForElement for hosted or rotated placement. Falls back to GetCurrentViewLevel when a level reference is needed.
usecase: User wants to place a specific family at an exact XY coordinate and height. AI needs to place equipment, fixtures, or devices at computed positions.
notfor: Loading families into the document (use ImportWithCloudFamiliesCommand). Placing multiple instances at once (use batch placement command). Placing families by picking points interactively.
precondition: Active document must be open with a plan or 3D view. The specified family must be loaded in the document.
postcondition: A FamilyInstance is created at the specified coordinates. The new instance is selected in the UI.

config_inputs.name: typeName
config_inputs.description: Optional type name in that family

preprompts: Placing family instance at the specified location...
